reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros pero pocos surtidores en funcionamiento por la cantidad de autos esperando.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants was good, but there were few pumps in operation due to the number of cars waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NS15TUdREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion. Tanto en la playa como en el Full

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Both on the beach and at the Full
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2azhmMzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención! Lástima la cola que se debe hacer para cargar combustible. Raro que no se esté más de 20 minutos esperando.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! It's a shame about the long line for fuel. It's surprising the wait isn't more than 20 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2LVpxR2JBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean

reviews.comment:
Los baños están muy limpios, pero la atención para cargar combustible fue muy lenta. Estuvimos 15’ estacionados en el surtidor sin que aparezca el playero.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are very clean, but the service at the gas station was very slow. We were parked at the pump for 15 minutes without the attendant showing up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MGFHWGd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena y cordial atención, orden para cargar combustible, higiene, falta + señalización para llegar al A.C.A

(Translated by Google)
Good and friendly service, orderly fueling process, cleanliness, need more signage to get to the A.C.A.
